description: Goods description mismatch - Invoice shows different product

expected_issues.description: Commercial invoice goods description must correspond with the LC

false_positive_checks.description: Goods mismatch should stay primary without layering a separate price anomaly finding into the documentary lane
Specific UCP600-18D should suppress the legacy cross-document goods mismatch duplicate.
Specific UCP600-18D should suppress the broad invoice umbrella article.
Issuer mismatch should not leak into a pure goods-description discrepancy.
Applicant mismatch should not leak into a pure goods-description discrepancy.
Currency mismatch should not leak into a pure goods-description discrepancy.
